title: Making date columns mandatory
excerpt: Is there a way to make dates a mandatory column? Human error continues to leave task off of our calendars because of a lack of date.

posts.author: mviquez (Michael Viquez)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to make dates a mandatory column? Human error continues to leave task off of our calendars because of a lack of date.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @mviquez - would you be able to elaborate a little further by mandatory? For example, do you mean the date column has to be filled in for an item to be created in the board? Or is this for when items are created via a form? I’d love to learn a bit more about your workflow

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mviquez

The Column Magic app can set a status or create an update on items where selected columns are empty.

image1111×1183 78 KB

Similar recipes exist supporting these triggers

  • When status changes to something…
  • When button clicked…
  • When column changes…
  • When an item is created…
  • When date arrives…

Jim - The Monday Man
